## Runtime.RuntimeRecipe.ingredients property

Gets resolved ingredients from the golden version. Convenience method - same as goldenVersion.getIngredients()

**Signature:**

```typescript
get ingredients(): ReadonlyArray<IResolvedRecipeIngredient<AnyRuntimeIngredient>>;
```
